- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. - File created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - User requested TS CRUD project for task entity.

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created package.json, tsconfig.json, src/index.ts with Express API.

- [x] Customize the Project - Implemented CRUD operations for the entity.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project - Built successfully with tsc.

- [x] Create and Run Task - Not needed, used npm scripts.

- [x] Launch the Project - Server running on localhost:3000.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md created.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
